title: I Tested GLM 5.2 vs Opus 4.8 vs GPT 5.5
summary: Chase AI published a benchmarking video comparing GLM 5.2 against Anthropic's Claude Opus 4.8 and OpenAI's GPT 5.5 to evaluate whether the open-source model lives up to hype. The evaluation used DeepSWE Bench and custom tests across multiple scenarios.
writeup: Chase AI benchmarks the open-source GLM 5.2 against Anthropic's Claude Opus 4.8 and OpenAI's GPT 5.5 to test whether GLM 5.2 matches its reputation. The comparison runs on DeepSWE Bench plus custom tests spanning multiple scenarios. The framing centers on whether an open-source model holds up against two proprietary frontier models on coding and general tasks.
